records.ety: [L. migratus, p. p. of migrare to migrate, transfer.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Migrated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Migrating (?).]

defs: To remove from one country or region to another, with a view to residence; to change one's place of residence; to remove; as, the Moors who migrated from Africa into Spain; to migrate to the West.
To pass periodically from one region or climate to another for feeding or breeding; -- said of certain birds, fishes, and quadrupeds.
